final:
// // This comment suggests that the counter decrements instead of increments when enable is high.
module binary_counter_load (
  input clk,
  input load,
  input enable,
  input [3:0] data,
  output reg [3:0] count
);

  always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (load) begin
      count <= data;
    end
    else if (enable) begin
      count <= count + 1'b1;
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This comment suggests that the counter decrements instead of increments when enable is high.
